cause_analysis.narrative: Haircutter in the Meadow churned on 2026-04-21 after 302 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-27 (phone_call) — first complaint keyword: "waste of time". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-27 via phone_call. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2025-12-30 via phone_call, client wrote: "Yes, this is Rob calling from the Hair Cutters in Secaucus, New Jersey. My number is 732-423-2807. Please call me ASAP t…" — no outbound response in 16 days.

[SLA example] On 2025-12-31 via phone_call, client wrote: "Every time I call this number, nobody's available at support. Call me, please, as soon as possible at my main mobile num…" — no outbound response in 15 days.
